{"id":"project-LICHEN-dk3c.1","title":"Spec: Define gateway-centric announce suppression","description":"Add normative section defining gateway-centric mode for announce suppression.

## Location
Modify spec/05-routing.md section 9 (Announce Routing)

## Changes

### 1. Relax announce requirement (line 72)
Change from:
| Announce send | MUST | MUST | MUST |

To:
| Announce send | MUST* | MUST* | MUST |

*MUST when no DODAG parent; MAY when DODAG joined with gateway-centric flag

### 2. Add gateway-centric mode constants
- ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_GATEWAY: 1800 sec (30 min, 6x normal)
- Or: announce disabled entirely when DODAG joined

### 3. DIO option for mode advertisement
Gateway sets flag in DIO indicating gateway-centric mode active. Nodes joining this DODAG reduce announce frequency.

### 4. Fallback behavior
- No DODAG or DODAG lost: revert to normal 300 sec announces
- Peer-to-peer when gateway-centric: use LOADng, not gradient cache

### 5. Normative language
- Nodes MUST send announces at normal interval when no DODAG parent
- Nodes MAY reduce announce interval to ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_GATEWAY when DODAG joined and gateway-centric flag set
- Nodes MAY disable announces entirely in gateway-centric mode
- Nodes MUST resume normal announces within 60 sec of DODAG loss","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T17:23:16.003871Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T17:23:16.003871Z","labels":["spec","protocol","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-dk3c.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-dk3c","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T17:23:16.135366Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value:
{"description":"Add normative section defining gateway-centric mode for announce suppression.

## Key design: Auto-detection, not config

Nodes auto-detect gateway-centric mode — no per-node configuration required:
1. Gateway sets flag in DIO (DODAG Configuration Option)
2. Node joins DODAG via standard RPL
3. Node parses flag, reduces announce interval automatically
4. On DODAG loss, node resumes normal announces

## Location
Modify spec/05-routing.md section 9 (Announce Routing)

## Changes

### 1. Relax announce requirement (line 72)
Change from:
| Announce send | MUST | MUST | MUST |

To:
| Announce send | MUST* | MUST* | MUST |

*MUST when no DODAG parent; MAY reduce/disable when DODAG joined with gateway-centric flag

### 2. DIO flag for mode advertisement
Add to DODAG Configuration Option (or new sub-option):
- Bit: GATEWAY_CENTRIC (1 = gateway-centric mode active)
- Gateway (DODAG root) sets this flag
- Nodes joining DODAG parse and honor it

### 3. Announce interval constants
- ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_NORMAL: 300 sec (current default)
- ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_GATEWAY: 1800 sec (6x slower) or disabled entirely

### 4. Node behavior
- No DODAG parent: MUST announce at ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_NORMAL
- DODAG joined + GATEWAY_CENTRIC flag: MAY use ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_GATEWAY or disable
- DODAG lost: MUST resume ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_NORMAL within 60 sec

### 5. Peer-to-peer fallback
When gateway-centric mode active and peer-to-peer needed:
- Gradient cache may be stale (announces are rare)
- Use LOADng for on-demand route discovery
- Accept higher latency for peer-to-peer as tradeoff"}

| Announce send | MUST | MUST | MUST |

| Announce send | MUST* | MUST* | MUST |

*MUST when no DODAG parent; MAY reduce/disable when DODAG joined with gateway-centric flag

Add to DODAG Configuration Option (or new sub-option):

- DODAG lost: MUST resume ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_NORMAL within 60 sec

When gateway-centric mode active and peer-to-peer needed:
- Gradient cache may be stale (announces are rare)
- Use LOADng for on-demand route discovery
- Accept higher latency for peer-to-peer as tradeoff","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T17:23:16.003871Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T17:26:06.837986Z","labels":["spec","protocol","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-dk3c.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-dk3c","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T17:23:16.135366Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value:
{"notes":"## Backwards Compatibility

**No flag day required.**

- Old nodes: Ignore GATEWAY_CENTRIC flag in DIO, continue 300-sec announces
- New nodes: Parse flag, reduce to 1800-sec or disable announces
- Mixed network: Works. Old nodes use more airtime but don't break anything.

**Requirements:**
- GATEWAY_CENTRIC flag MUST be in reserved/ignored bits of existing DIO option
- Old nodes MUST ignore unknown DIO option bits (per RPL spec)
- New nodes MUST accept traffic from nodes announcing at any interval
- Peer-to-peer between old nodes works via their announces
- Peer-to-peer to new nodes uses LOADng (new nodes may not have fresh gradient)"}
